prompt: A luminous fantasy-anime movie poster in a vertical theatrical one-sheet composition, centered on a cute chibi-style fairy girl standing on a glowing circular platform in a futuristic neon city at night. She has short wavy auburn hair, pointed elf ears, large sparkling brown eyes, translucent iridescent butterfly wings, and a clear glittering beret-like halo cap. Her face is intentionally obscured by a centered square mosaic censor block. She poses like a performer or creator on stage, one arm raised holding a glowing pen-like wand, the other arm extended outward. She wears a glossy white cropped long-sleeve top, holographic iridescent shorts, and chunky white sneakers. The whole image is drenched in pastel violet, pink, blue, and pearlescent highlights, with floating particles, lens flares, sparkles, bokeh, butterflies, and magical light trails. Around her float 10 translucent holographic social-media-style panels and interface cards: 1 large post card at upper left showing her portrait with the Japanese text "今日の想いを、シェアします。" and reaction counts "12.6K", "532", and "1.2K"; 1 small quote card near top center-left reading "今日の気づき 小さな一歩が未来を変える。"; 1 small memo card at top center-right reading "アイデアメモ いつか、声になる物語。"; 1 large video post card at upper right showing her portrait with a play button and the text "夢は、声に出すと動き出す。"; 1 square heart-like icon panel at mid-left; 1 quote card at left center reading "あなたの言葉に救われました。"; 1 story panel at lower left reading "みんなのストーリー あなたの体験が、誰かの勇気に。" with 3 small thumbnail images; 1 reply/comment card at mid-right reading "共感しました！ ずっと応援しています！" with a tiny profile icon; 1 prompt panel at right center reading "プロンプト 光、希望、つながり、未来、魔法、優しさ" with a button labeled "生成"; and 1 hashtag card at lower right reading "#想いがつながる #今日もありがとう #未来をつくるのは私たち". Add 2 floating engagement counters near the lower right of the character: a heart counter "25.8K" and a repost/share counter "3.7K". Include a diagonal film strip in the lower left foreground with 4 visible frames featuring the fairy girl, plus a partially visible video editing timeline interface beneath it. The background should feel like a magical digital metropolis with skyscrapers, screens, and a crowd silhouette at the bottom, blending social media, filmmaking, and fairy-tale aesthetics. At the very top, place the Japanese tagline "ひとつの投稿が、誰かの明日を光らせる。" in elegant white text. At the bottom center, create a huge glowing Japanese title in ornate serif calligraphy: "タイムラインの妖精", with a small butterfly ornament, and below it the English subtitle "FAIRY AYA". Add realistic movie-poster credit lines in Japanese beneath the title, including names such as "監督：ヒカリ ユウ", "脚本：ナナセ マイ", "出演：フェアリー アヤ", and a row of production credits ending with "2025 FAIRY AYA Film Partners". Along the very bottom, add the Japanese line "あなたの投稿が、映画になる。" and a large release line "2025.7.25(金) ROADSHOW". Style: ultra-detailed, glossy, cinematic, whimsical, inspirational, high-saturation fantasy social-media poster, polished 3D anime illustration, dramatic poster lighting, volumetric glow, magical realism, premium film advertising design.
